steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject is the noun phrase “an artificial intelligence” (singular), followed by a relative clause and participial phrase. After the blank is the direct object “Chicago's energy grid.” The blank requires a verb to complete the independent clause.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement: a singular subject requires a singular verb form. “Powers” provides this singular form for the subject “an artificial intelligence.” The other choices all use plural verb forms that violate this agreement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
